'''Jyrenne Base''' was located on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], near [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]]. It was the main [[Imperial Army-Navy Ordnance Center]] for the [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="GNN10" />

==History==
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] Jyrenne Base was under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Corlen]]. The base had a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. The local [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], [[Lasre Dardano]], established [[Whisper Base]] to [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on the admiral, using the base's activity to cover its operation.

In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Jyrenne Base was [[Attack on the Imperial Army-Navy Ordnance Center|attacked]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] and almost completely destroyed by [[Shandor Squadron]]. The attack left Imperial supply lines in [[Airon sector/Legends|Airon sector]] almost crippled.<ref name="GNN10" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jyrenne Base was first mentioned in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. The Base also featured in [[Fantasy Flight Games]]' adventure campaign ''[[Operation: Shadowpoint]]''. It serves as a location for several suggested "seeds" for players to act out.
